subject: Implement ashlr__websearch dedup pipeline
description: Build the domain deduplication and snippet truncation pipeline for ashlr__websearch. Should integrate with summarizeIfLarge for result sets > 3 entries. See Track B spec in ultrathink-deploy-agents plan.

subject: Add PreToolUse hook for WebSearch redirect
description: Create pretooluse-websearch.ts following the pretooluse-grep.ts pattern. Should block in redirect mode and nudge in nudge mode. Include hook-timings telemetry.

subject: Write unit tests for websearch and task tools
description: Test files: __tests__/websearch.test.ts and __tests__/task-tools.test.ts. Mock recordSavingAccurate and summarizeIfLarge. Cover: dedup, truncation, summarize gate, savings call shape.

subject: Register new tools in _router-handlers.ts and hooks.json
description: Add import statements for websearch-server-handlers and task-server-handlers to _router-handlers.ts. Add WebSearch, TaskList, TaskGet matchers to hooks/hooks.json. Verify no circular imports.

subject: Create bench fixtures for Track H
description: Add bench/fixtures/websearch-*.json and bench/fixtures/tasklist-*.json with realistic shapes for benchmark runs. 3-5 files each. Synthetic data is fine.

subject: Update commands/ashlr-help.md with new tools
description: Add ashlr__websearch and ashlr__task_list / ashlr__task_get to the help command listing.

subject: Track H: benchmark all new v1.22 tools
description: Run bench suite against websearch + task fixtures. Report token savings vs baseline. Target: > 40% reduction for websearch, > 50% for task list with 50+ items.
